title: SkillCard
description: Schema for validating Skill Cards used in the agent skill chain system. Derived from existing skill card markdown files with YAML frontmatter.

name.description: Human-readable name of the skill card. Must be 3-100 characters.

category.description: Category of the skill card. Must be one of: pattern (recurrent failure/success patterns), workflow (step-by-step procedures), domain (domain-specific knowledge).

description.description: Brief description of what this skill card covers. Must be 10-500 characters.

when_to_use.description: List of situations where this skill card should be applied. At least one entry required.

common_failures.description: List of common failure patterns this card addresses. At least one entry required.

version.description: Semantic version string (semver format, e.g. '1.0.0', '2.1.0-alpha'). Optional.

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for search and categorization. Optional.

related_cards.description: Names or IDs of related skill cards. Optional.

created_at.description: Date when the skill card was created (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

updated_at.description: Date when the skill card was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

priority.description: Priority level indicating how important this skill card is. Optional.
